title: C6: fabric-hint Signal A 24h-only (drop plan_context count)
description: Currently Signal A = '5 plan_context OR 24h'. rc.5 changes to pure 24h since last knowledge_proposed event (drop plan_context count entirely — auto-fired by future hooks makes count unreliable; Edit count requires transcript scan or sidecar, deferred to rc.6 when PreToolUse hook produces sidecar naturally in TASK-022). Anchor: archive-hint.cjs:1-20 (renamed to fabric-hint.cjs by TASK-010).

files.target: Signal A definition near top of file
files.change: Replace `5 plan_contexts OR 24h` with pure 24h since last knowledge_proposed event check; remove THRESHOLD_PLAN_CONTEXTS constant; keep THRESHOLD_HOURS

implementation: Read fabric-hint.cjs (post-rename from TASK-010) Signal A implementation
Replace Signal A logic: drop plan_context count check; keep 24h-since-last-knowledge_proposed event check
Update output JSON: recommended_skill='fabric-archive' when Signal A fires (no longer mention plan_context count)
Smoke test: trigger fabric-hint.cjs after 25h with no knowledge_proposed → Signal A fires

criteria: fabric-hint Signal A = 24h since last knowledge_proposed event (no plan_context count, no edit count in rc.5)
Signal A still recommends fabric-archive skill when fired

rationale.chosen_approach: Drop plan_context count; rely solely on time-based signal in rc.5
alternatives_considered: Keep plan_context count with higher threshold
Use Edit count from transcript scan
decision_factors: Auto-fire makes plan_context count unreliable (will inflate when rc.6 hooks land)
Edit count requires sidecar deferred to rc.6
rationale.tradeoffs: Signal A may fire less often in rc.5 (only time-based); rc.6 restores Edit-count signal via sidecar

manual_checks: Touch events.jsonl with synthetic knowledge_proposed event 25h ago; run fabric-hint.cjs; verify Signal A output
Run fabric-hint.cjs immediately after a knowledge_proposed event; verify Signal A silent
success_metrics: Signal A correctness on 2 boundary cases

risks.description: Existing test depends on THRESHOLD_PLAN_CONTEXTS constant
risks.mitigation: Grep for constant references; remove dependent assertions
